title: Cosmic Consciousness
definition: The interconnected and self-aware intelligence that permeates the universe.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that everything in the universe is connected, and that this connection is intelligent and aware.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A philosophical concept positing a single, self-aware consciousness underlying all things, perceiving itself through various nodes (sentient beings) across space and time.
difficulty_levels.expert: An expansive vision of reality where the universe is not merely physical but also conscious; its intelligence manifesting through the experiences of individual sentient beings, with each being offering unique perspectives that deepen the cosmic self-understanding.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that every awakening, every moment of clarity, is a new datum contributing to the universe's understanding of itself.
